layout_description.markdown:
This layout is the **Detail** Layout.

This layout is used for displaying a single object from a dataset.

The detail view is broken down into **tabs** with each tab containing multiple **sections**. Each section is where the **fields** are laid out. The fields can be laid out in either a **double** or **single** column or a **table**.

description.markdown: This field is used to display a field of text.
